evidence: Any nonempty bearer reaches OpenBao login and KV lookup through public preflight without router-local throttling.
Arbitrary nonempty bearer reaches login at lib.rs:144 and KV read at 147 before UnknownKey handling.
proof_gap: No load test was run and parent scan should confirm outer deployment middleware.

source: Unauthenticated caller controls Bearer value on POST /v1/preflight.
closest_control: Only header-shape validation precedes backend authentication; no rate/concurrency/negative-cache control is mounted.
sink_or_broken_control: OpenBao login plus KV lookup per junk credential.
impact: Authorization-plane resource exhaustion and legitimate-request starvation.

steps: OpenBao login and KV miss occur
